generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder for tracking crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for wind speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for data acquisition and transmission"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ArduinoData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series crane operational data for historical storage and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, ArduinoData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for motion simulation of the crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for creating CAD models"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python for developing kinematic model and digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerizing components to ensure portability"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Mosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data communication between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for system optimization of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational data recording"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service ensuring model accuracy against physical system data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance AirQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction capabilities for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of model accuracy using distance metrics and thresholds for trajectory measurements"
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for crane system performance"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical operational data for analysis and model updates"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python application for collecting physical crane data and transmitting via MQTT"
]

instance GantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for research and education"
]

instance GantryCraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for the gantry crane system"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment for the gantry crane system"
    base:contains GantryCrane, GantryCraneController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service creates optimal movement trajectories using a crane kinematics model, which are transmitted to the Control Application (a Python application). The Control Application then utilizes the Physical Crane Interface to send control commands to the physical crane hardware, enabling precise movement execution based on digital twin-generated plans."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system utilizes the C4 Model for architectural visualization, with containerized components via Docker. Key technologies include TimescaleDB for time-series data storage, Grafana for visualization dashboards, and Eclipse Mosquitto as the MQTT message broker for inter-component communication."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares real-time trajectory data with simulated predictions using predefined threshold values to detect discrepancies and trigger adaptive responses."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for inter-service communication through the MQTT Broker. The network topology is centralized around the MQTT Broker for message routing. No details on bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols are provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer. The Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard are containerized using Docker with a docker compose file for deployment. Python components are packaged as installable modules via pip, allowing for local execution without cloud dependencies. This setup supports a single-machine on-premise deployment model with Docker-based containerization."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved through MQTT protocol using Eclipse Mosquitto as the message broker, enabling real-time data exchange between physical sensors and the digital twin components."
]
